steps.description: HTTP endpoint returns kata state for project with active kata session
steps.actual: 200 response with kata_state object containing currentMode=housekeeping, currentPhase=p0, completedPhases=[], updatedAt fields

steps.description: HTTP endpoint returns null for project without kata state
steps.actual: 200 response with {"kata_state": null} for temporary project without .kata/ directory

steps.description: HTTP endpoint returns 404 for unknown project

steps.actual: 200 response with {"kata_state": null} when latest state.json contained invalid JSON

steps.description: WebSocket receives kata_state event on state.json change
steps.actual: Received {"type":"kata_state","project":"baseplane-dev1","kata_state":{...}} via WebSocket after writing state.json content
